description: Each record class resolves a retention clock by governing state through the jurisdiction packs — per-state clocks with the strictest (longest) cascade.

cases.name: a Nevada clinical record resolves the NV pack clock (5)
an Illinois clinical record resolves the longer IL clock (10)
a multi-state basis takes the LONGEST applicable clock (NV provider, IL patient: 10)
a Minnesota clinical record resolves the MN clock (7)
